description_long: This is a metallic helmet with a rounded dome and extended cheek guards, reminiscent of ancient Greek or Roman designs. The surface is predominantly a dark, weathered steel with visible patches of rust and wear, giving it an aged and battle-worn appearance. Decorative embossed motifs, including floral and crescent shapes, are present on the front, adding a touch of ornamentation to the otherwise utilitarian form. The helmet lacks any visible openings for ventilation or a visor, and the back is smooth and unadorned. The interior is not visible, but the helmet appears hollow and designed to fit over a human head. Its robust construction suggests it was intended for protection in combat or ceremonial use.
description: A weathered, metallic helmet with cheek guards and decorative embossed motifs on the front, featuring a dark, aged steel finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the helmet's rounded dome, extended cheek guard, and subtle surface wear.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the decorative embossed motifs and the open face area with cheek guards.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with visible rust patches and another cheek guard, mirroring the first side.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the smooth, unadorned back of the helmet.
attribute_graphic_design: Decorative embossed motifs including floral and crescent shapes on the front; otherwise plain and unadorned.
